title: Evidence Record
description: Machine-verifiable evidence from a verification run in the extension repo.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this verification run.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the run completed.

surfaces_checked.description: List of verification surfaces that were executed.

status.description: Overall result of the verification run.

message.description: Error message or stdout/stderr from the failed check.

failures.description: Details of any failed surfaces. Empty array on pass.

git_sha.description: Git commit SHA at the time of the run.

stdout.description: Combined stdout from the verification run.

stderr.description: Combined stderr from the verification run.

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock time for the full verification run.

agent.description: Which agent triggered this verification run.

task_id.description: Task identifier this evidence is associated with.
